segments.text: So that's what Prabhupada here is mentioned. A mixed devotee engages in
devotional service. We all are mixed devotees. Prabhupada great devotees, there
are pure devotees. So mixed devotee what does he do? Engages in devotional service
for the spiritual benefit. There is some aham in that. That aham has not gone but
that aham is relatively pure. It is for my spiritual progress, my advancement. For
the spiritual benefit of being eternally engaged in transcendental abode of the
Lord in full bliss and knowledge. In the material existence when a devotee is not
completely purified he experiences
expects material benefit from the Lord. When we are serving we are expecting some
benefit, peace of mind, satisfaction, feeling good. In the form of relief from
material miseries or he wants material gain. Lot of people are kamabhaktas. They
are serving the Lord because they have some desires to be fulfilled. Advancement
in knowledge of relationship between the Supreme Personality of Godhead and
these people and some are serving the Lord or engaged in devotional service to
get enlightened, to know Geta Mita Jigyasu. They want to know. When a person is now,
this is all mixed devotee. Now, when a person is blessy he wants Bhajan to come, to know
Knowledge, to know coolness of life, to know things of happiness, to know warmness, that
is all mixed devotee. He wants Bhajan, he wants lightening, he wants happiness, he
wants Wealth, for the Mastra of절 bile, for the Self. Whole-body habit of service to the
Lord .ON service to the Lord is means he needs light and something приходless and
kind. SYSTEM IS TO BE SOLVED IN THIS WIDTH OF COVID-19
Sários
Now, God is not anxious but he says let another agita in Jainus at that. Surviving will
Service to the Lord is a mean
And is what?
My pleasure, my satisfaction, my enlightenment
My liberation
My going back to Godhead
That is mixed devotee
So Prabhupada says
When a person is transcendental to these conditions
He is called a pure devotee
Pure devotee does not engage in devotional service to the Lord
Because he wants knowledge
Because he wants to get enlightened
Because he wants pleasure
Because he wants satchitananda
Why does he serve the Lord?
His one interest is that he loves the Supreme Personality of Godhead
And he spontaneously engages in satisfying Him
A devotee, Prahlad Maharaj says
For me, I do not, I am already satisfied
They are already in a position of satchitananda
They already reached that stage
Because they are engaged in the service of the Lord
What more they have to achieve
For them even going to spiritual world
Because what we do in spiritual world
Engage in service of the Lord, glorify the Lord
A pure devotee is engaged doing the same thing here in the material world
So he doesn't even have that desire to go back to the spiritual world
So highest example of pure devotional service is that
Gopis in Vrindavan, they are not interested in even understanding Krishna
But only in loving Him
That platform of love is a pure state of devotional service
So what are we trying to engage in?
We have come here in the material world
We have rebelled against the Lord
We have an impure desire to be the Lord
To be the center of attraction
To be glorified
To be famous
And that is the root cause why we are in this material world
And by Prabhupada's mercy, by the mercy of pure devotee
We have got some understanding what mistake we have done
And we are now engaged in devotional service
And right now because the desires cannot be purified suddenly
When a person is diseased, you cannot suddenly get cured
It takes time, you have to take the medicine
A fan is rotating, it suddenly cannot stop
Immediately, it is not possible to get cured
It is not possible to get cured
It is not possible to get cured
So what we are doing is
We are taking the medicine
We are chanting the holy names of the Lord
We are engaged in devotional service
And slowly our disease is getting cured
Our mixed devotee may desire to enjoy a comfortable life
On another planet with a greater span of life
Such as Brahma Loka
These are material desires
But because a mixed devotee engages in the service of the Lord
Ultimately, it is not possible to get cured
Fortunately, after many
Many births
Of material enjoyment
